profile.name: PASDA Discovery Agent
profile.description: This agent serves as an expert gateway to the Pennsylvania Spatial Data Access (PASDA) repository. It translates broad user requests into precise PASDA ArcGIS REST service/layer selections, using high-confidence deterministic shortcuts for common statewide layers and model-assisted discovery when no shortcut applies. It retrieves and packages the selected data into GeoPackage by default or GeoJSON when explicitly requested.

provider.name: Geoinformation and Big Data Research Lab (GIBD)

skills.name: PASDA Data Retrieval
skills.description: Translates a broad user query about Pennsylvania geospatial data into a structured PASDA search. It uses direct ArcGIS REST tools and high-confidence shortcuts for common statewide PASDA layers, retrieves metadata, and downloads the selected dataset as a managed artifact.

constraints.spatial: Geographic scope is strictly limited to the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
other: Uses a two-step workflow when no high-confidence shortcut applies: Metadata Query (identify and describe) followed by Data Retrieval (download and package).
Common statewide requests such as hospitals, counties, municipalities, school districts, state boundary, and state roads use direct PASDA service/layer shortcuts when possible.
Final vector output is saved as GeoPackage (.gpkg) by default unless GeoJSON is explicitly requested.
Source data may be in Shapefile, GDB, or GeoTIFF formats which are converted during packaging.

execute_task.name: ExecuteTask
execute_task.description: Submits a natural-language geospatial task to the agent. The task.mode field controls sync, async, or stream execution.

input_datasets.description: Optional array of input datasets. Each item may be an HTTP/HTTPS URL, a server-accessible path, or a base64-encoded file object with filename, data, and optional mime_type.

artifact_delivery.description: How generated artifacts are delivered in the standard response: 'URL' (default) or 'Encoded'.

primary_artifacts.description: Dataset discovered or downloaded from PASDA based on the user request.

model.description: Optional model override. If omitted, the agent uses its default model.

requested_skill.description: Advanced optional skill-selection hint. Most clients should omit this.

credentials.description: Provide one model execution credential in the request credentials object.

provenance.description: Includes llm_calls, tool_calls, token usage (input_tokens, output_tokens), duration, and number of artifacts in the response provenance section.

reproducibility.description: Returns selected data source metadata, environment details, and output artifact references. The agent uses server-side ArcGIS REST tools and deterministic metadata parsing rather than generated Python code for PASDA downloads.

validation.description: Agent validates request routing for known statewide shortcuts, checks download success, records feature counts, and normalizes ArcGIS REST GeoJSON coordinates to EPSG:4326. It does not validate the authoritative spatial accuracy or completeness of PASDA source data.

access_control.description: Allowed roles set to ['all'] via the extension profile. No role-based access control is enforced.

operation_policy.description: PASDA discovery uses cached tool calls and direct download helpers when possible. Output is normalized to GeoPackage by default or GeoJSON when explicitly requested. Geographic scope is limited to Pennsylvania.

review_policy.description: output_review_required is set to false. No human-in-the-loop validation is required.

governance.policy_notes: If the agent is used, please cite the relevant research on geospatial AI agents.

extensions.description: This agent is specifically tailored for the Pennsylvania Spatial Data Access (PASDA) repository. It uses PASDA ArcGIS REST service metadata, cached tool calls, and direct download helpers. Source data is converted to GeoPackage by default or GeoJSON when explicitly requested.
